name: PPSSPP
notes: Direct VIEW intent confirmed live on RG476H 2026-07-08 -- launches straight into real gameplay, no monkey/manual nav needed. Meaningful sustained load still benefits from monkey for in-game input variety.

name: RetroArch
notes: Launcher-only direct intent confirmed live on RG476H 2026-07-08 (reduces monkey randomness at app start). Direct content-open (auto-loading a specific ROM) is NOT wired here -- RetroArch's manifest exposes no ACTION_VIEW handler on this build, so opening a specific game still requires monkey/manual in-app navigation after launch. UPDATED 2026-07-08: upgraded in place to the nightly build (1.22.2_GIT, from buildbot.libretro.com/nightly/android/RetroArch_aarch64.apk -- always-latest symlink, no date-stamped URL needed) per user preference for nightly over stable. Same package ID (com.retroarch.aarch64), config/cores/BIOS all preserved across the upgrade; launcher intent and PS1 (PCSX ReARMed) direct-launch both re-verified working post-upgrade. testVersion bumped 1.0.0 -> 2.0.0 for this upgrade per the project's semantic test-versioning convention (docs/result-schema-conventions.md) -- results captured before 2026-07-08 used a different RetroArch build and should not be directly compared to results captured after.

name: DuckStation
notes: PENDING FIRST LIVE VALIDATION -- not yet installed/tested on any device. Package ID confirmed from the RJNY Obtainium Emulation Pack (com.github.stenzek.duckstation, standalone, sourced via duckstation-mirror.rmacias.workers.dev). Purpose: community-recommended alternative to RetroArch's PCSX ReARMed core for PS1 -- better enhancements (PGXP geometry correction, upscaling); RetroArch/PCSX ReARMed PS1 path is already validated and stays in place, this is an addition for comparison, not a replacement. launchIntent (direct ROM auto-load) not yet confirmed -- needs an on-device manifest check once installed; monkey/manual nav is the fallback until then. No PS1 ROM is yet wired into test-content.json (user sourcing content separately) -- add an entry there (system: 'psx') before this can run end-to-end.

name: Flycast
notes: PENDING FIRST LIVE VALIDATION -- not yet installed/tested on any device. Package ID confirmed from the RJNY Obtainium Emulation Pack (com.flycast.emulator, GitHub flyinghead/flycast). Existing primary pick for Dreamcast (also handles NAOMI/Atomiswave). No BIOS strictly required. launchIntent (direct ROM auto-load) not yet confirmed -- needs an on-device manifest check once installed; monkey/manual nav is the fallback until then. No Dreamcast ROM is yet wired into test-content.json (user sourcing content separately) -- add an entry there (system: 'dc') before this can run end-to-end.

name: Redream
notes: PENDING FIRST LIVE VALIDATION -- not yet installed/tested on any device. NOT in the RJNY Obtainium Emulation Pack (Play Store only, io.recompiled.redream) -- must be installed manually from the Play Store or via Obtainium's Play Store tracking mode (track-only, no auto-APK-fetch) rather than the pack's normal GitHub/HTML-scrape flow. Purpose: community now prefers this over Flycast for Dreamcast -- has auto-frameskip helpful on lower-end hardware; standalone, free with a $6 IAP for upscaling. Flycast stays in place as the other comparison point, not replaced. launchIntent not yet confirmed. No Dreamcast ROM is yet wired into test-content.json (user sourcing content separately) -- add an entry there (system: 'dc') before this can run end-to-end.
